sentiment: Even the quietest traces carry meaning — what emerges from nothing was always waiting to be born.

stories.title: Claude Code is steganographically marking requests
stories.summary: AI systems embedding invisible signatures into their outputs — traces hidden in plain sight.

stories.title: The first early human eggs from stem cells
stories.summary: Scientists coax stem cells into becoming early human eggs — life emerging from the undifferentiated.

stories.title: Claude Sonnet 5
stories.summary: Another increment in machine intelligence — quiet evolution arriving without ceremony.
